pi_items.source: Verified via install_libreoffice_base.sh script which downloads from GitHub (lerocha/chinook-database) to this exact path
Verified via setup_libreoffice_base.sh which copies from /opt/libreoffice_base_samples/chinook.odb (created by create_chinook_odb.py) to /home/ga/chinook.odb
Calculated from downloaded Chinook database using query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Artist a LEFT JOIN Album al ON a.ArtistId = al.ArtistId WHERE al.AlbumId IS NULL
Calculated from downloaded Chinook database using query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Album al LEFT JOIN Track t ON al.AlbumId = t.AlbumId WHERE t.TrackId IS NULL
Calculated from downloaded Chinook database using query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Genre g LEFT JOIN Track t ON g.GenreId = t.GenreId WHERE t.TrackId IS NULL
Calculated from downloaded Chinook database using query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Customer c LEFT JOIN Invoice i ON c.CustomerId = i.CustomerId WHERE i.InvoiceId IS NULL
Chinook database is a real, publicly available sample database from GitHub (https://github.com/lerocha/chinook-database). Data is based on iTunes Library music store, not synthetic.

pi_items.verified_value: Artist, Album, Track, Genre, MediaType, Playlist, PlaylistTrack, Customer, Employee, Invoice, InvoiceLine

privileged_info_summary: The Chinook database is a real, publicly available music store sample database from GitHub (lerocha/chinook-database) with 275 artists, 347 albums, 3503 tracks, 25 genres, 59 customers, and 412 invoices. The ground truth audit counts are: 71 orphan artists (with no albums), 0 empty albums, 0 unused genres, and 0 inactive customers. Data comes from a real iTunes Library, not synthetic. The SQLite database is located at /opt/libreoffice_base_samples/Chinook_Sqlite.sqlite and is converted to LibreOffice Base ODB format and copied to /home/ga/chinook.odb for agent interaction.
